question: My order has been in transit for 7 days. What is happening?
answer: We sincerely apologise for the delay. We have escalated your shipment with our courier partner TCS. Your order is currently held at the Karachi hub due to high volume. It should be delivered within the next 2 business days. We are monitoring it closely and will update you immediately if anything changes.

question: Mera order 3 din pehle dispatch hua tha, abhi tak nahi aaya?
answer: Aap ki pareshani samajh aa rahi hai. Aap ka order TCS ke saath dispatch hua hai aur filhaal transit mein hai. Delivery estimate 2-4 business days hai. Tracking number SMS mein bhej diya gaya tha. Agar kal tak na aaye toh hum courier se escalate karein ge aur aap ko update karein ge.

question: I received the wrong item. I ordered a blue shirt but got a red one.
answer: We are sorry for this packing error. We will arrange an immediate replacement. Please keep the incorrect item — no return is required for items below PKR 1,000. The correct blue shirt will be dispatched within 24 hours via express delivery. You will receive a new tracking number shortly.

question: Main ne order cancel kiya tha lekin abhi bhi dispatch show ho raha hai?
answer: Aap ka cancellation request receive hua tha lekin unfortunately order dispatch ho chuka tha. Humne courier ko rokne ki koshish ki lekin mumkin nahi ho saka. Jab order deliver ho toh simply refuse kar dein. Refund 5-7 business days mein process ho ga. Inconvenience ke liye ek PKR 200 voucher aap ke account mein add kar diya.

question: Can I change my delivery address? I moved to a new location.
answer: Yes, address changes are possible if your order is still in Processing status. I can see your order is still processing. I have updated your delivery address. Please confirm the new address is correct in your order details. If the order has already dispatched, address changes are unfortunately not possible.

question: Mujhe parcel delivery pe ghar pe koi nahi mila, ab kya hoga?
answer: Courier ne delivery attempt kiya tha lekin koi available nahi tha. Wo kal dubara try karega. Aap chahtey hain toh delivery time slot reschedule kar saktey hain ya nearest courier office se pickup bhi possible hai. Courier office ka address aur timing alag se SMS kar dete hain.

question: My order shows delivered but I never received it.
answer: This is very concerning. We have immediately opened an investigation with our courier partner Leopard. They have been asked to provide GPS delivery confirmation within 24 hours. Please also check with neighbours and building reception. We will resolve this within 48 hours with re-delivery or a full refund.

question: Kya main order place karne ke baad item add kar sakta hun?
answer: Agar aap ka order abhi Processing status mein hai toh items add kiye ja saktey hain. Main aap ka order check kar raha hun... order abhi bhi processing mein hai. Kaunsa item add karna chahte hain? Additional amount aap ki original payment method pe charge ho ga aur revised invoice email par milega.

question: What is the estimated delivery time for Quetta?
answer: For Quetta, standard delivery takes 5-7 business days through M&P Logistics. Express delivery is not available for Quetta at this time. Orders are dispatched from our Karachi warehouse. You will receive tracking updates via SMS at each stage.

question: Mere order ka packaging damage tha, products sahi hain ya nahi?
answer: Pehle sab items check karein. Agar koi bhi item damage hai toh turant photo lein aur hum se share karein. Packaging damage ki wajah se andar ka saman safe rehta hai aksar. Lekin koi cheez damage nikle toh return/replace request instantly process ho gi. Photos ke saath report submit karein app mein.

question: I returned my item 2 weeks ago but still no refund.
answer: I can see your return was received and approved. The refund was initiated to your JazzCash account. JazzCash transfers can take 3-5 business days due to bank processing. If you still have not received it, please provide your JazzCash number and we will verify the transfer status directly with them.

question: Mera refund credit card pe kab aayega?
answer: Aap ka refund 3 din pehle process hua tha. Credit card refunds bank ke processing time ke mutabiq 5-7 business days mein reflect hote hain. Bank holidays aur weekends is timeline mein count nahi hote. Agar 7 business days mein nahi aaya toh bank se rabta karein aur refund reference number share karein jo email mein bheja gaya tha.

question: I want to return a sale item. Is that allowed?
answer: Sale items can be returned within 14 days of delivery instead of the standard 30 days. The item must be in original condition with tags. If the item is defective, the full 30-day return policy applies. Please initiate the return through your order history in the app and select the appropriate reason.

question: Cash on delivery pe liya tha, refund kaise milega?
answer: COD refunds ke liye aap ka bank account ya EasyPaisa/JazzCash number chahiye. Account settings mein refund details update karein. Ek baar information provide ho jaane ke baad refund 5-7 business days mein process ho ta hai. Agar aap ka account registered nahi hai toh support se rabta karein.

question: I was charged twice for the same order.
answer: I can see your transaction history and you are correct — there appear to be two charges for your order. One appears to be a pre-authorisation that should have been released. I am escalating this to our payments team now. The duplicate charge will be reversed within 2-3 business days with email confirmation.

question: Mujhe partial refund mila, puri amount kyun nahi di?
answer: Partial refund is liye issue hua kyunki aap ne order discount pe buy kiya tha. Refund policy ke mutabiq discounted orders ka refund actual paid amount ke hisaab se hota hai. Aap ki order summary check karein — refund amount wahi hai jo aap ne actually pay kiya tha. Agar koi error lagta hai toh details share karein.

question: I cannot log in to my account. It says my password is incorrect.
answer: Let me help you reset your password. Please click Forgot Password on the login page and enter your registered email or phone number. An OTP will be sent to your phone. If your phone number has changed, I can help after verifying your identity with CNIC details. Shall I walk you through the process?

question: Mera account freeze ho gaya hai, kyun?
answer: Account freeze kai wajuhaat se ho sakti hai jaise suspicious activity, payment dispute, ya KYC expiry. Main aap ka account check kar raha hun... laga hai aap ki CNIC verification expire ho gayi hai. Updated CNIC ki photos submit karein aur 24 ghante mein account unfreeze ho jayega. Settings > Verification mein jayen.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
answer: Go to Account Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. Choose SMS OTP or Authenticator App. For SMS, just toggle it on and verify with the OTP sent to your phone. For an authenticator app, scan the QR code and enter the 6-digit code to confirm. Save your backup codes in a safe place.

question: Main ne account delete karne ki request di thi, kab hoga?
answer: Account deletion request receive ho gayi hai. Process 30 days mein complete hoti hai. Is period mein aap account reactivate kar saktey hain. Active orders aur pending refunds pehle complete hone chahiye. Deletion ke baad aap ka data 90 days mein permanently delete ho jayega policy ke mutabiq.

question: My EasyPaisa payment failed but money was deducted.
answer: This can happen due to a network timeout during payment processing. The deducted amount will be automatically refunded to your EasyPaisa wallet within 24-72 hours. Please do not retry the payment as this may cause a duplicate charge. If not returned within 72 hours, contact us with your EasyPaisa transaction reference.

question: Credit card se payment nahi ho rahi, error aa raha hai.
answer: Credit card error aksar bank ki taraf se block ki wajah se aata hai. Apne bank se rabta karein aur online transactions enable karein. Dusri wajah card expiry ya galat CVV bhi ho sakti hai. Specifically kaunsa error message aa raha hai mujhe batayein toh aur bhi help kar sakta hun.

question: Can I pay in installments without a credit card?
answer: Yes, our Buy Now Pay Later option via PostEx Payments works without a credit card for orders above PKR 3,000. You can also use installment plans through Meezan Bank and Faysal Bank debit cards. 0% markup plans are available for 3, 6, and 12 month tenures. Select your preferred plan at checkout.

question: What are your customer service hours?
answer: Our AI support is available 24/7 and handles most issues instantly. Human agents are available Monday to Saturday 9 AM to 10 PM PKT. On Sundays, only AI support and emergency escalations are handled. Premium tier customers have 24/7 human support access. We aim to respond within minutes during business hours.

question: App mein naya account banana hai lekin OTP nahi aa raha.
answer: OTP delay kai wajuhaat se ho sakta hai. Pehle check karein SMS blocked toh nahi hai. Network coverage bhi wajah ho sakti hai. 2-3 minute wait karein phir Resend OTP click karein. Agar phir bhi na aaye toh Email OTP option use karein. Warna humari helpline pe call karein aur hum manually account verify kar denge.

question: How do I track my order using the tracking number?
answer: Your tracking number is in the dispatch confirmation SMS and email. Enter it at resolveai.pk/track or directly on the courier's website. For TCS use tcs.com.pk, for Leopard use leopardscourier.com.pk. The app also shows live tracking under My Orders. Status updates every 2-4 hours during business days.

question: How do I initiate a return for a defective product?
answer: Go to My Orders, select the item, click Return/Refund, choose Defective Product as the reason, describe the defect, and upload photos or a short video. Our team reviews defect claims within 12 business hours. Approved claims get a free pickup scheduled and replacement dispatched simultaneously.

question: I need to update my CNIC for KYC. How do I do it?
answer: Go to Account > Verification > Update CNIC. Upload clear photos of both sides of your new CNIC. Ensure the text is sharp and no corners are obscured. Verification is reviewed within 4 business hours. Your account remains active during the review period.

question: What is Raast and how do I use it to pay?
answer: Raast is SBP's national instant payment system. It is free and processes in under 30 seconds. Select Raast at checkout, enter your Raast ID (your IBAN or phone-linked ID registered with your bank), and confirm. Supported by HBL, Meezan, MCB, NBP, and most major banks.

question: How do I join the ResolvePoints loyalty program?
answer: You are automatically enrolled in ResolvePoints when you create an account. Start earning immediately — 1 point per PKR 100 spent. Check your balance in Account > My Rewards. Redeem at checkout for discounts. Birthday bonus gives double points for 7 days around your registered birthday.

question: Can I pay in installments without a credit card? [ref #82]
answer: Yes, our Buy Now Pay Later option via PostEx Payments works without a credit card for orders above PKR 3,000. You can also use installment plans through Meezan Bank and Faysal Bank debit cards. 0% markup plans are available for 3, 6, and 12 month tenures. Select your preferred plan at checkout.

question: What are your customer service hours? [ref #83]
answer: Our AI support is available 24/7 and handles most issues instantly. Human agents are available Monday to Saturday 9 AM to 10 PM PKT. On Sundays, only AI support and emergency escalations are handled. Premium tier customers have 24/7 human support access. We aim to respond within minutes during business hours.

question: App mein naya account banana hai lekin OTP nahi aa raha. [ref #84]
answer: OTP delay kai wajuhaat se ho sakta hai. Pehle check karein SMS blocked toh nahi hai. Network coverage bhi wajah ho sakti hai. 2-3 minute wait karein phir Resend OTP click karein. Agar phir bhi na aaye toh Email OTP option use karein. Warna humari helpline pe call karein aur hum manually account verify kar denge.

question: How do I track my order using the tracking number? [ref #85]
answer: Your tracking number is in the dispatch confirmation SMS and email. Enter it at resolveai.pk/track or directly on the courier's website. For TCS use tcs.com.pk, for Leopard use leopardscourier.com.pk. The app also shows live tracking under My Orders. Status updates every 2-4 hours during business days.

question: How do I initiate a return for a defective product? [ref #86]
answer: Go to My Orders, select the item, click Return/Refund, choose Defective Product as the reason, describe the defect, and upload photos or a short video. Our team reviews defect claims within 12 business hours. Approved claims get a free pickup scheduled and replacement dispatched simultaneously.

question: I need to update my CNIC for KYC. How do I do it? [ref #87]
answer: Go to Account > Verification > Update CNIC. Upload clear photos of both sides of your new CNIC. Ensure the text is sharp and no corners are obscured. Verification is reviewed within 4 business hours. Your account remains active during the review period.

question: What is Raast and how do I use it to pay? [ref #88]
answer: Raast is SBP's national instant payment system. It is free and processes in under 30 seconds. Select Raast at checkout, enter your Raast ID (your IBAN or phone-linked ID registered with your bank), and confirm. Supported by HBL, Meezan, MCB, NBP, and most major banks.

question: How do I join the ResolvePoints loyalty program? [ref #89]
answer: You are automatically enrolled in ResolvePoints when you create an account. Start earning immediately — 1 point per PKR 100 spent. Check your balance in Account > My Rewards. Redeem at checkout for discounts. Birthday bonus gives double points for 7 days around your registered birthday.

question: My order has been in transit for 7 days. What is happening? [ref #90]
answer: We sincerely apologise for the delay. We have escalated your shipment with our courier partner TCS. Your order is currently held at the Karachi hub due to high volume. It should be delivered within the next 2 business days. We are monitoring it closely and will update you immediately if anything changes.

question: Mera order 3 din pehle dispatch hua tha, abhi tak nahi aaya? [ref #91]
answer: Aap ki pareshani samajh aa rahi hai. Aap ka order TCS ke saath dispatch hua hai aur filhaal transit mein hai. Delivery estimate 2-4 business days hai. Tracking number SMS mein bhej diya gaya tha. Agar kal tak na aaye toh hum courier se escalate karein ge aur aap ko update karein ge.

question: I received the wrong item. I ordered a blue shirt but got a red one. [ref #92]
answer: We are sorry for this packing error. We will arrange an immediate replacement. Please keep the incorrect item — no return is required for items below PKR 1,000. The correct blue shirt will be dispatched within 24 hours via express delivery. You will receive a new tracking number shortly.

question: Main ne order cancel kiya tha lekin abhi bhi dispatch show ho raha hai? [ref #93]
answer: Aap ka cancellation request receive hua tha lekin unfortunately order dispatch ho chuka tha. Humne courier ko rokne ki koshish ki lekin mumkin nahi ho saka. Jab order deliver ho toh simply refuse kar dein. Refund 5-7 business days mein process ho ga. Inconvenience ke liye ek PKR 200 voucher aap ke account mein add kar diya.

question: Can I change my delivery address? I moved to a new location. [ref #94]
answer: Yes, address changes are possible if your order is still in Processing status. I can see your order is still processing. I have updated your delivery address. Please confirm the new address is correct in your order details. If the order has already dispatched, address changes are unfortunately not possible.

question: Mujhe parcel delivery pe ghar pe koi nahi mila, ab kya hoga? [ref #95]
answer: Courier ne delivery attempt kiya tha lekin koi available nahi tha. Wo kal dubara try karega. Aap chahtey hain toh delivery time slot reschedule kar saktey hain ya nearest courier office se pickup bhi possible hai. Courier office ka address aur timing alag se SMS kar dete hain.

question: My order shows delivered but I never received it. [ref #96]
answer: This is very concerning. We have immediately opened an investigation with our courier partner Leopard. They have been asked to provide GPS delivery confirmation within 24 hours. Please also check with neighbours and building reception. We will resolve this within 48 hours with re-delivery or a full refund.

question: Kya main order place karne ke baad item add kar sakta hun? [ref #97]
answer: Agar aap ka order abhi Processing status mein hai toh items add kiye ja saktey hain. Main aap ka order check kar raha hun... order abhi bhi processing mein hai. Kaunsa item add karna chahte hain? Additional amount aap ki original payment method pe charge ho ga aur revised invoice email par milega.

question: What is the estimated delivery time for Quetta? [ref #98]
answer: For Quetta, standard delivery takes 5-7 business days through M&P Logistics. Express delivery is not available for Quetta at this time. Orders are dispatched from our Karachi warehouse. You will receive tracking updates via SMS at each stage.

question: Mere order ka packaging damage tha, products sahi hain ya nahi? [ref #99]
answer: Pehle sab items check karein. Agar koi bhi item damage hai toh turant photo lein aur hum se share karein. Packaging damage ki wajah se andar ka saman safe rehta hai aksar. Lekin koi cheez damage nikle toh return/replace request instantly process ho gi. Photos ke saath report submit karein app mein.

question: I returned my item 2 weeks ago but still no refund. [ref #100]
answer: I can see your return was received and approved. The refund was initiated to your JazzCash account. JazzCash transfers can take 3-5 business days due to bank processing. If you still have not received it, please provide your JazzCash number and we will verify the transfer status directly with them.

question: Mera refund credit card pe kab aayega? [ref #101]
answer: Aap ka refund 3 din pehle process hua tha. Credit card refunds bank ke processing time ke mutabiq 5-7 business days mein reflect hote hain. Bank holidays aur weekends is timeline mein count nahi hote. Agar 7 business days mein nahi aaya toh bank se rabta karein aur refund reference number share karein jo email mein bheja gaya tha.

question: I want to return a sale item. Is that allowed? [ref #102]
answer: Sale items can be returned within 14 days of delivery instead of the standard 30 days. The item must be in original condition with tags. If the item is defective, the full 30-day return policy applies. Please initiate the return through your order history in the app and select the appropriate reason.

question: Cash on delivery pe liya tha, refund kaise milega? [ref #103]
answer: COD refunds ke liye aap ka bank account ya EasyPaisa/JazzCash number chahiye. Account settings mein refund details update karein. Ek baar information provide ho jaane ke baad refund 5-7 business days mein process ho ta hai. Agar aap ka account registered nahi hai toh support se rabta karein.

question: I was charged twice for the same order. [ref #104]
answer: I can see your transaction history and you are correct — there appear to be two charges for your order. One appears to be a pre-authorisation that should have been released. I am escalating this to our payments team now. The duplicate charge will be reversed within 2-3 business days with email confirmation.

question: Mujhe partial refund mila, puri amount kyun nahi di? [ref #105]
answer: Partial refund is liye issue hua kyunki aap ne order discount pe buy kiya tha. Refund policy ke mutabiq discounted orders ka refund actual paid amount ke hisaab se hota hai. Aap ki order summary check karein — refund amount wahi hai jo aap ne actually pay kiya tha. Agar koi error lagta hai toh details share karein.

question: I cannot log in to my account. It says my password is incorrect. [ref #106]
answer: Let me help you reset your password. Please click Forgot Password on the login page and enter your registered email or phone number. An OTP will be sent to your phone. If your phone number has changed, I can help after verifying your identity with CNIC details. Shall I walk you through the process?

question: Mera account freeze ho gaya hai, kyun? [ref #107]
answer: Account freeze kai wajuhaat se ho sakti hai jaise suspicious activity, payment dispute, ya KYC expiry. Main aap ka account check kar raha hun... laga hai aap ki CNIC verification expire ho gayi hai. Updated CNIC ki photos submit karein aur 24 ghante mein account unfreeze ho jayega. Settings > Verification mein jayen.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication? [ref #108]
answer: Go to Account Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. Choose SMS OTP or Authenticator App. For SMS, just toggle it on and verify with the OTP sent to your phone. For an authenticator app, scan the QR code and enter the 6-digit code to confirm. Save your backup codes in a safe place.

question: Main ne account delete karne ki request di thi, kab hoga? [ref #109]
answer: Account deletion request receive ho gayi hai. Process 30 days mein complete hoti hai. Is period mein aap account reactivate kar saktey hain. Active orders aur pending refunds pehle complete hone chahiye. Deletion ke baad aap ka data 90 days mein permanently delete ho jayega policy ke mutabiq.

question: My EasyPaisa payment failed but money was deducted. [ref #110]
answer: This can happen due to a network timeout during payment processing. The deducted amount will be automatically refunded to your EasyPaisa wallet within 24-72 hours. Please do not retry the payment as this may cause a duplicate charge. If not returned within 72 hours, contact us with your EasyPaisa transaction reference.

question: I want to return a sale item. Is that allowed? [ref #162]

question: Cash on delivery pe liya tha, refund kaise milega? [ref #163]

question: I was charged twice for the same order. [ref #164]
answer: I can see your transaction history and you are correct — there appear to be two charges for your order. One appears to be a pre-authorisation that should have been released. question: Mujhe partial refund mila, puri amount kyun nahi di? [ref #165]

question: I cannot log in to my account. It says my password is incorrect. [ref #166]

question: Mera account freeze ho gaya hai, kyun? [ref #167]

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication? [ref #168]
answer: Go to Account Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. Choose SMS OTP or Authenticator App. For SMS, just toggle it on and verify with the OTP sent to your phone. question: Main ne account delete karne ki request di thi, kab hoga? [ref #169]
answer: Account deletion request receive ho gayi hai. Process 30 days mein complete hoti hai. Is period mein aap account reactivate kar saktey hain. question: My EasyPaisa payment failed but money was deducted. [ref #170]

question: Credit card se payment nahi ho rahi, error aa raha hai. [ref #171]

question: Can I pay in installments without a credit card? [ref #172]
answer: Yes, our Buy Now Pay Later option via PostEx Payments works without a credit card for orders above PKR 3,000. question: What are your customer service hours? [ref #173]

question: App mein naya account banana hai lekin OTP nahi aa raha. [ref #174]

question: How do I track my order using the tracking number? [ref #175]

question: How do I initiate a return for a defective product? [ref #176]
answer: Go to My Orders, select the item, click Return/Refund, choose Defective Product as the reason, describe the defect, and upload photos or a short video. question: I need to update my CNIC for KYC. How do I do it? [ref #177]
answer: Go to Account > Verification > Update CNIC. Upload clear photos of both sides of your new CNIC. Ensure the text is sharp and no corners are obscured. Verification is reviewed within 4 business hours. Your account remains active during the review period.

question: What is Raast and how do I use it to pay? [ref #178]
answer: Raast is SBP's national instant payment system. It is free and processes in under 30 seconds. Select Raast at checkout, enter your Raast ID (your IBAN or phone-linked ID registered with your bank), and confirm. Supported by HBL, Meezan, MCB, NBP, and most major banks.

question: How do I join the ResolvePoints loyalty program? [ref #179]

question: I returned my item 2 weeks ago but still no refund. [ref #250]

question: Mera refund credit card pe kab aayega? [ref #251]

question: I want to return a sale item. Is that allowed? [ref #252]

question: Cash on delivery pe liya tha, refund kaise milega? [ref #253]

question: I was charged twice for the same order. [ref #254]
answer: I can see your transaction history and you are correct — there appear to be two charges for your order. One appears to be a pre-authorisation that should have been released. question: Mujhe partial refund mila, puri amount kyun nahi di? [ref #255]
answer: Partial refund is liye issue hua kyunki aap ne order discount pe buy kiya tha. Refund policy ke mutabiq discounted orders ka refund actual paid amount ke hisaab se hota hai. question: I cannot log in to my account. It says my password is incorrect. [ref #256]
answer: Let me help you reset your password. Please click Forgot Password on the login page and enter your registered email or phone number. An OTP will be sent to your phone. If your phone number has changed, I can help after verifying your identity with CNIC details. Shall I walk you through the process?

question: Mera account freeze ho gaya hai, kyun? [ref #257]
answer: Account freeze kai wajuhaat se ho sakti hai jaise suspicious activity, payment dispute, ya KYC expiry. Main aap ka account check kar raha hun... laga hai aap ki CNIC verification expire ho gayi hai. Updated CNIC ki photos submit karein aur 24 ghante mein account unfreeze ho jayega. Settings > Verification mein jayen.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication? [ref #258]
answer: Go to Account Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. Choose SMS OTP or Authenticator App. For SMS, just toggle it on and verify with the OTP sent to your phone. For an authenticator app, scan the QR code and enter the 6-digit code to confirm. Save your backup codes in a safe place.

question: Main ne account delete karne ki request di thi, kab hoga? [ref #259]
answer: Account deletion request receive ho gayi hai. Process 30 days mein complete hoti hai. Is period mein aap account reactivate kar saktey hain. Active orders aur pending refunds pehle complete hone chahiye. Deletion ke baad aap ka data 90 days mein permanently delete ho jayega policy ke mutabiq.

question: My EasyPaisa payment failed but money was deducted. [ref #260]
answer: This can happen due to a network timeout during payment processing. The deducted amount will be automatically refunded to your EasyPaisa wallet within 24-72 hours. Please do not retry the payment as this may cause a duplicate charge. If not returned within 72 hours, contact us with your EasyPaisa transaction reference.

question: Credit card se payment nahi ho rahi, error aa raha hai. [ref #261]
answer: Credit card error aksar bank ki taraf se block ki wajah se aata hai. Apne bank se rabta karein aur online transactions enable karein. Dusri wajah card expiry ya galat CVV bhi ho sakti hai. Specifically kaunsa error message aa raha hai mujhe batayein toh aur bhi help kar sakta hun.

question: Can I pay in installments without a credit card? [ref #262]
answer: Yes, our Buy Now Pay Later option via PostEx Payments works without a credit card for orders above PKR 3,000. question: What are your customer service hours? [ref #263]
answer: Our AI support is available 24/7 and handles most issues instantly. Human agents are available Monday to Saturday 9 AM to 10 PM PKT. question: How do I initiate a return for a defective product? [ref #266]

question: I need to update my CNIC for KYC. How do I do it? [ref #267]

question: My EasyPaisa payment failed but money was deducted. [ref #320]

question: Credit card se payment nahi ho rahi, error aa raha hai. [ref #321]

question: Can I pay in installments without a credit card? [ref #322]
answer: Yes, our Buy Now Pay Later option via PostEx Payments works without a credit card for orders above PKR 3,000. question: What are your customer service hours? [ref #323]
answer: Our AI support is available 24/7 and handles most issues instantly. Human agents are available Monday to Saturday 9 AM to 10 PM PKT. question: App mein naya account banana hai lekin OTP nahi aa raha. [ref #324]
answer: OTP delay kai wajuhaat se ho sakta hai. Pehle check karein SMS blocked toh nahi hai. Network coverage bhi wajah ho sakti hai. 2-3 minute wait karein phir Resend OTP click karein. question: How do I track my order using the tracking number? [ref #325]
answer: Your tracking number is in the dispatch confirmation SMS and email. Enter it at resolveai.pk/track or directly on the courier's website. question: How do I initiate a return for a defective product? [ref #326]
answer: Go to My Orders, select the item, click Return/Refund, choose Defective Product as the reason, describe the defect, and upload photos or a short video. Our team reviews defect claims within 12 business hours. Approved claims get a free pickup scheduled and replacement dispatched simultaneously.

question: I need to update my CNIC for KYC. How do I do it? [ref #327]
answer: Go to Account > Verification > Update CNIC. Upload clear photos of both sides of your new CNIC. Ensure the text is sharp and no corners are obscured. Verification is reviewed within 4 business hours. Your account remains active during the review period.

question: What is Raast and how do I use it to pay? [ref #328]
answer: Raast is SBP's national instant payment system. It is free and processes in under 30 seconds. Select Raast at checkout, enter your Raast ID (your IBAN or phone-linked ID registered with your bank), and confirm. Supported by HBL, Meezan, MCB, NBP, and most major banks.

question: How do I join the ResolvePoints loyalty program? [ref #329]
answer: You are automatically enrolled in ResolvePoints when you create an account. Start earning immediately — 1 point per PKR 100 spent. Check your balance in Account > My Rewards. Redeem at checkout for discounts. Birthday bonus gives double points for 7 days around your registered birthday.

question: My order has been in transit for 7 days. What is happening? [ref #330]

question: Mera order 3 din pehle dispatch hua tha, abhi tak nahi aaya? [ref #331]

question: I received the wrong item. I ordered a blue shirt but got a red one. [ref #332]

question: Main ne order cancel kiya tha lekin abhi bhi dispatch show ho raha hai? [ref #333]

question: Can I change my delivery address? I moved to a new location. [ref #334]
answer: Yes, address changes are possible if your order is still in Processing status. I can see your order is still processing. I have updated your delivery address. question: Mujhe parcel delivery pe ghar pe koi nahi mila, ab kya hoga? [ref #335]

question: My order shows delivered but I never received it. [ref #336]

question: What is the estimated delivery time for Quetta? [ref #338]

question: Mera refund credit card pe kab aayega? [ref #401]

question: I want to return a sale item. Is that allowed? [ref #402]

question: Cash on delivery pe liya tha, refund kaise milega? [ref #403]
answer: COD refunds ke liye aap ka bank account ya EasyPaisa/JazzCash number chahiye. Account settings mein refund details update karein. Ek baar information provide ho jaane ke baad refund 5-7 business days mein process ho ta hai. Agar aap ka account registered nahi hai toh support se rabta karein.

question: I was charged twice for the same order. [ref #404]
answer: I can see your transaction history and you are correct — there appear to be two charges for your order. One appears to be a pre-authorisation that should have been released. question: Mujhe partial refund mila, puri amount kyun nahi di? [ref #405]
answer: Partial refund is liye issue hua kyunki aap ne order discount pe buy kiya tha. Refund policy ke mutabiq discounted orders ka refund actual paid amount ke hisaab se hota hai. question: I cannot log in to my account. It says my password is incorrect. [ref #406]
answer: Let me help you reset your password. Please click Forgot Password on the login page and enter your registered email or phone number. An OTP will be sent to your phone. If your phone number has changed, I can help after verifying your identity with CNIC details. Shall I walk you through the process?

question: Mera account freeze ho gaya hai, kyun? [ref #407]
answer: Account freeze kai wajuhaat se ho sakti hai jaise suspicious activity, payment dispute, ya KYC expiry. Main aap ka account check kar raha hun... laga hai aap ki CNIC verification expire ho gayi hai. Updated CNIC ki photos submit karein aur 24 ghante mein account unfreeze ho jayega. Settings > Verification mein jayen.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication? [ref #408]
answer: Go to Account Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. Choose SMS OTP or Authenticator App. For SMS, just toggle it on and verify with the OTP sent to your phone. For an authenticator app, scan the QR code and enter the 6-digit code to confirm. Save your backup codes in a safe place.

question: Main ne account delete karne ki request di thi, kab hoga? [ref #409]
answer: Account deletion request receive ho gayi hai. Process 30 days mein complete hoti hai. Is period mein aap account reactivate kar saktey hain. Active orders aur pending refunds pehle complete hone chahiye. Deletion ke baad aap ka data 90 days mein permanently delete ho jayega policy ke mutabiq.

question: My EasyPaisa payment failed but money was deducted. [ref #410]
answer: This can happen due to a network timeout during payment processing. The deducted amount will be automatically refunded to your EasyPaisa wallet within 24-72 hours. Please do not retry the payment as this may cause a duplicate charge. If not returned within 72 hours, contact us with your EasyPaisa transaction reference.

question: Credit card se payment nahi ho rahi, error aa raha hai. [ref #411]
answer: Credit card error aksar bank ki taraf se block ki wajah se aata hai. Apne bank se rabta karein aur online transactions enable karein. Dusri wajah card expiry ya galat CVV bhi ho sakti hai. Specifically kaunsa error message aa raha hai mujhe batayein toh aur bhi help kar sakta hun.

question: Can I pay in installments without a credit card? [ref #412]
answer: Yes, our Buy Now Pay Later option via PostEx Payments works without a credit card for orders above PKR 3,000. You can also use installment plans through Meezan Bank and Faysal Bank debit cards. 0% markup plans are available for 3, 6, and 12 month tenures. Select your preferred plan at checkout.

question: What are your customer service hours? [ref #413]
answer: Our AI support is available 24/7 and handles most issues instantly. Human agents are available Monday to Saturday 9 AM to 10 PM PKT. question: App mein naya account banana hai lekin OTP nahi aa raha. [ref #414]
answer: OTP delay kai wajuhaat se ho sakta hai. Pehle check karein SMS blocked toh nahi hai. Network coverage bhi wajah ho sakti hai. 2-3 minute wait karein phir Resend OTP click karein. Agar phir bhi na aaye toh Email OTP option use karein. Warna humari helpline pe call karein aur hum manually account verify kar denge.

question: How do I track my order using the tracking number? [ref #415]
answer: Your tracking number is in the dispatch confirmation SMS and email. Enter it at resolveai.pk/track or directly on the courier's website. For TCS use tcs.com.pk, for Leopard use leopardscourier.com.pk. The app also shows live tracking under My Orders. Status updates every 2-4 hours during business days.

question: How do I initiate a return for a defective product? [ref #416]
answer: Go to My Orders, select the item, click Return/Refund, choose Defective Product as the reason, describe the defect, and upload photos or a short video. Our team reviews defect claims within 12 business hours. Approved claims get a free pickup scheduled and replacement dispatched simultaneously.

question: I need to update my CNIC for KYC. How do I do it? [ref #417]
answer: Go to Account > Verification > Update CNIC. Upload clear photos of both sides of your new CNIC. Ensure the text is sharp and no corners are obscured. Verification is reviewed within 4 business hours. Your account remains active during the review period.

question: What is Raast and how do I use it to pay? [ref #418]
answer: Raast is SBP's national instant payment system. It is free and processes in under 30 seconds. Select Raast at checkout, enter your Raast ID (your IBAN or phone-linked ID registered with your bank), and confirm. Supported by HBL, Meezan, MCB, NBP, and most major banks.

question: How do I join the ResolvePoints loyalty program? [ref #419]
answer: You are automatically enrolled in ResolvePoints when you create an account. Start earning immediately — 1 point per PKR 100 spent. Check your balance in Account > My Rewards. Redeem at checkout for discounts. Birthday bonus gives double points for 7 days around your registered birthday.

answer: Raast is SBP's national instant payment system. It is free and processes in under 30 seconds. Select Raast at checkout, enter your Raast ID (your IBAN or phone-linked ID registered with your bank), and confirm. Supported by HBL, Meezan, MCB, NBP, and most major banks.

question: How do I join the ResolvePoints loyalty program? [ref #479]
answer: You are automatically enrolled in ResolvePoints when you create an account. Start earning immediately — 1 point per PKR 100 spent. Check your balance in Account > My Rewards. Redeem at checkout for discounts. Birthday bonus gives double points for 7 days around your registered birthday.

question: My order has been in transit for 7 days. What is happening? [ref #480]
answer: We sincerely apologise for the delay. We have escalated your shipment with our courier partner TCS. Your order is currently held at the Karachi hub due to high volume. It should be delivered within the next 2 business days. We are monitoring it closely and will update you immediately if anything changes.

question: Mera order 3 din pehle dispatch hua tha, abhi tak nahi aaya? [ref #481]
answer: Aap ki pareshani samajh aa rahi hai. Aap ka order TCS ke saath dispatch hua hai aur filhaal transit mein hai. Delivery estimate 2-4 business days hai. Tracking number SMS mein bhej diya gaya tha. Agar kal tak na aaye toh hum courier se escalate karein ge aur aap ko update karein ge.

question: I received the wrong item. I ordered a blue shirt but got a red one. [ref #482]
answer: We are sorry for this packing error. We will arrange an immediate replacement. Please keep the incorrect item — no return is required for items below PKR 1,000. The correct blue shirt will be dispatched within 24 hours via express delivery. You will receive a new tracking number shortly.

question: Main ne order cancel kiya tha lekin abhi bhi dispatch show ho raha hai? [ref #483]
answer: Aap ka cancellation request receive hua tha lekin unfortunately order dispatch ho chuka tha. Humne courier ko rokne ki koshish ki lekin mumkin nahi ho saka. Jab order deliver ho toh simply refuse kar dein. Refund 5-7 business days mein process ho ga. Inconvenience ke liye ek PKR 200 voucher aap ke account mein add kar diya.

question: Can I change my delivery address? I moved to a new location. [ref #484]
answer: Yes, address changes are possible if your order is still in Processing status. I can see your order is still processing. I have updated your delivery address. Please confirm the new address is correct in your order details. If the order has already dispatched, address changes are unfortunately not possible.

question: Mujhe parcel delivery pe ghar pe koi nahi mila, ab kya hoga? [ref #485]
answer: Courier ne delivery attempt kiya tha lekin koi available nahi tha. Wo kal dubara try karega. Aap chahtey hain toh delivery time slot reschedule kar saktey hain ya nearest courier office se pickup bhi possible hai. Courier office ka address aur timing alag se SMS kar dete hain.

question: My order shows delivered but I never received it. [ref #486]
answer: This is very concerning. We have immediately opened an investigation with our courier partner Leopard. They have been asked to provide GPS delivery confirmation within 24 hours. Please also check with neighbours and building reception. We will resolve this within 48 hours with re-delivery or a full refund.

question: Kya main order place karne ke baad item add kar sakta hun? [ref #487]
answer: Agar aap ka order abhi Processing status mein hai toh items add kiye ja saktey hain. Main aap ka order check kar raha hun... order abhi bhi processing mein hai. Kaunsa item add karna chahte hain? Additional amount aap ki original payment method pe charge ho ga aur revised invoice email par milega.

question: What is the estimated delivery time for Quetta? [ref #488]
answer: For Quetta, standard delivery takes 5-7 business days through M&P Logistics. Express delivery is not available for Quetta at this time. Orders are dispatched from our Karachi warehouse. You will receive tracking updates via SMS at each stage.

question: Mere order ka packaging damage tha, products sahi hain ya nahi? [ref #489]
answer: Pehle sab items check karein. Agar koi bhi item damage hai toh turant photo lein aur hum se share karein. Packaging damage ki wajah se andar ka saman safe rehta hai aksar. Lekin koi cheez damage nikle toh return/replace request instantly process ho gi. Photos ke saath report submit karein app mein.

question: I returned my item 2 weeks ago but still no refund. [ref #490]
answer: I can see your return was received and approved. The refund was initiated to your JazzCash account. JazzCash transfers can take 3-5 business days due to bank processing. question: Mera refund credit card pe kab aayega? [ref #491]
answer: Aap ka refund 3 din pehle process hua tha. Credit card refunds bank ke processing time ke mutabiq 5-7 business days mein reflect hote hain. Bank holidays aur weekends is timeline mein count nahi hote. Agar 7 business days mein nahi aaya toh bank se rabta karein aur refund reference number share karein jo email mein bheja gaya tha.

question: I want to return a sale item. Is that allowed? [ref #492]
answer: Sale items can be returned within 14 days of delivery instead of the standard 30 days. The item must be in original condition with tags. If the item is defective, the full 30-day return policy applies. Please initiate the return through your order history in the app and select the appropriate reason.

question: Cash on delivery pe liya tha, refund kaise milega? [ref #493]
answer: COD refunds ke liye aap ka bank account ya EasyPaisa/JazzCash number chahiye. Account settings mein refund details update karein. Ek baar information provide ho jaane ke baad refund 5-7 business days mein process ho ta hai. Agar aap ka account registered nahi hai toh support se rabta karein.

question: I was charged twice for the same order. [ref #494]
answer: I can see your transaction history and you are correct — there appear to be two charges for your order. One appears to be a pre-authorisation that should have been released. question: Mujhe partial refund mila, puri amount kyun nahi di? [ref #495]
answer: Partial refund is liye issue hua kyunki aap ne order discount pe buy kiya tha. Refund policy ke mutabiq discounted orders ka refund actual paid amount ke hisaab se hota hai. question: I cannot log in to my account. It says my password is incorrect. [ref #496]
answer: Let me help you reset your password. Please click Forgot Password on the login page and enter your registered email or phone number. An OTP will be sent to your phone. question: Mera account freeze ho gaya hai, kyun? [ref #497]
answer: Account freeze kai wajuhaat se ho sakti hai jaise suspicious activity, payment dispute, ya KYC expiry. Main aap ka account check kar raha hun... laga hai aap ki CNIC verification expire ho gayi hai. Updated CNIC ki photos submit karein aur 24 ghante mein account unfreeze ho jayega. Settings > Verification mein jayen.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication? [ref #498]
answer: Go to Account Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. Choose SMS OTP or Authenticator App. For SMS, just toggle it on and verify with the OTP sent to your phone. For an authenticator app, scan the QR code and enter the 6-digit code to confirm. Save your backup codes in a safe place.

question: Main ne account delete karne ki request di thi, kab hoga? [ref #499]
answer: Account deletion request receive ho gayi hai. Process 30 days mein complete hoti hai. Is period mein aap account reactivate kar saktey hain. Active orders aur pending refunds pehle complete hone chahiye. Deletion ke baad aap ka data 90 days mein permanently delete ho jayega policy ke mutabiq.

question: My EasyPaisa payment failed but money was deducted. [ref #500]

Please do not retry the payment as this may cause a duplicate charge. If not returned within 72 hours, contact us with your EasyPaisa transaction reference.

question: Credit card se payment nahi ho rahi, error aa raha hai. [ref #501]

question: Can I pay in installments without a credit card? [ref #502]

question: What are your customer service hours? [ref #503]
